hooks.command: CMD=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',d).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$CMD" in *grep*|*rg\ *|*ripgrep*|*find\ *|*fd\ *|*ack\ *|*ag\ *)   [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] &&   echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: knowledge graph at graphify-out/. For focused questions, run `graphify query \"<question>\"` (scoped subgraph, usually much smaller than GRAPH_REPORT.md) instead of grepping raw files. Read GRAPH_REPORT.md only for broad architecture context."}}'   || true ;; esac

QUERY=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); ti=d.get('tool_input',{}); print(ti.get('query','') or ti.get('url',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$QUERY" in *next*|*react*|*tailwind*|*framer*|*supabase*|*lucide*|*zustand*|*axios*|*typescript*|*zod*|*framer-motion*|*sonner*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"context7: Library/framework docs detected. Use mcp__context7__resolve-library-id then mcp__context7__query-docs instead — scoped to installed version, no web noise, cheaper tokens."}}' ;; esac

FILE=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$FILE" in *components/*.tsx|*components/*.ts|*app/*.tsx|*app/*.ts) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"design-check: UI file edited. When this component/page task is complete, spawn the design-reviewer subagent (Agent tool, subagent_type=design-reviewer) — runs in isolation, zero main-context token cost."}}' ;; esac
